name: @logicn/ext-photonic-emulator
description: LogicN photonic-PPU backend: a physics-faithful (Rung-2) MZI-mesh / micro-ring ternary-MAC emulator + the partition cost-model router behind the neutral Brain/Brawn bridge contract. Digital stays the default; photonic only on a proven net win; fail-closed to digital. EMULATED, not silicon (no measured speedup).
note: R&D 0053 GAP, hub production build. Ports the prove-own-maths D1 emulator (rd-photonic-ppu-emulator-proof.mjs, 18/18) and D2 router (rd-photonic-ppu-cost-model-proof.mjs, 25/25) into a real package behind @logicn/inference-bridge-contract. crypto-on-core: crypto/control-flow never offload. The Tower-side photonic dispatch wiring (the separate Freivalds/tolerance re-verify path that bypasses the bit-exact ternary determinism oracle) is a separate iteration. Contract imported by relative path to the sibling dist (repo convention; offline, no node_modules).
